title: Buzzy
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|buzz}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Buzzy |homeworld=[[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]]{{JournalCite|1|First Contact}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Gamgalon]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Buzzy, go tell 'em they've got a customer. Rush job.|Fleck orders Buzzy to find Tropis-on-Varonat's hyperdrive mechanic to assist in the repair of the ''Uwana Buyer''|}} '''Buzzy''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived in [[Tropis-on-Varonat]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]]. He was employed by [[Gamgalon]], a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crimelord]] who used [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]-[[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] expeditions as a front for growing and harvesting chemically altered [[Aleudrupe berry/Legends|aleudrupe berries]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he and his companion, [[Fleck (Human)|Fleck]], greeted [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]] of [[Sif-Uwana]] and his [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quelev Tapper|Seoul]], to Varonat. The pair—actually [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] Talon Karrde and Quelev Tapper in disguise—claimed to need a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] to look at their [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Uwana Buyer]]''. Fleck sent Buzzy to find their mechanic, a Human female named [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Celina Marniss]], and told her that a rush job needed to be done. The next [[Standard day/Legends|day]], Buzzy accompanied the Krish [[Falmal]] on a Morodin-hunting safari of six hunters, including Karrde and Tapper. ==Biography== {{Quote|As Buzzy may have mentioned, we're in something of a hurry.|Talon Karrde, disguised as Syndic Pandis Hart, talks with Mara Jade, posing as mechanic Celina Marniss|}} [[File:Varonat.jpg|left|thumb|The planet Varonat]] Buzzy, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], lived in the settlement of [[Tropis-on-Varonat]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]], located on the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]] in the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Varonat system/Legends|Varonat system]] In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], a [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] named [[Gamgalon]] came to the planet and established a safari that [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] [[Morodin/Legends|Morodins]], a large herbivore that roamed the planet's jungles. Based out of Tropis-on-Varonat, the safari was a front for Gamgalon's true operation: the slime secreted by the Morodins as they moved around the jungle was a natural fertilizer that changed the chemical composition of [[Aleudrupe berry/Legends|aleudrupe berries]]. The pits of the fruit were then able to act as a catalyst, and when joined with [[rethan-K]] and [[promhassic triaxli]], created ammunition for [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] as strong as spin-sealed [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas. All three substances were usually non-lethal and perfectly legal, and would withstand any customs inspection or chemical scan. Buzzy began working for Gamgalon, and in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] was present when the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Uwana Buyer]]'' landed on Varonat. Alongside [[Fleck (Human)|Fleck]], who worked as a [[come-up flector]] for Gamgalon, Buzzy greeted [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Talon Karrde|Pandis Hart]], chief purchasing agent of the [[Sif-Uwana Council]], and his [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quelev Tapper|Seoul]]. Hart and Seoul—who were, in reality, [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] Talon Karrde and his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Quelev Tapper—claimed to have [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Engine/Legends|engine]] troubles and were in need of a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. Karrde and Tapper had heard about Gamgalon's safaris and suspected it was a front for a larger enterprise, and were investigating the possibility of acquiring a slice of the action for themselves. Fleck did most of the talking with the newcomers, and sent Buzzy off to find the settlement's mechanic, a Human woman named [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Celina Marniss]], while he persuaded the disguised smugglers to sign up to the next safari expedition that was leaving the next day. Buzzy found Marniss—who was actually the former [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]], Mara Jade—and informed her of the repair job that needed attending to, mentioning that he was impressed with Syndic Hart. [[File:Gamgalon.jpg|thumb|right|The Krish, Gamgalon]] The next morning, Buzzy was a member of the safari expedition alongside the Krish [[Falmal]], Gamgalon's chief lieutenant, and the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Jombo]]. In addition to Karrde and Tapper, the expedition consisted of four other hunters: the [[Thennqora]], [[Tamish]]; a [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]] named [[Cob-caree]]; and a pair of [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] called [[Hav]] and [[Jivis]]. The group broke into three groups to travel to the safari base camp by [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]]; Buzzy accompanied Hav and Jivis in their [[Arrow-17 airspeeder|vehicle]]. The group then hiked through the jungle for several [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to reach the hunting trails. While Falmal led the group, Buzzy stayed in the center while Jombo brought up the rear. After several hours, the party began setting up camp when they heard the [[Morodin (language)|distinctive growl]] of a Morodin nearby. At Falmal's order, the party broke into the same groups of three that had traveled together on the airspeeders, and Buzzy took Hav and Jivis into the jungle to hunt the Morodin. Although Falmal, accompanied by Karrde and Tapper, found the creature first, it was Tamish and Cob-caree who made the [[Death/Legends|kill]] when Karrde hesitated in pulling the trigger. Shortly after, Karrde and Tapper disappeared from the camp and made a discovery that Gamgalon was keeping secret: the Morodins were actually a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Gamgalon confronted the pair of smugglers in person, alongside several other Krish including Falmal. Not wanting Karrde to cut into his operation, Gamgalon planned to kill the pair. The two smugglers attempted to escape; Tapper was killed in the attempt, but Karrde was rescued by Celina Marniss, who killed Gamgalon and Falmal. The mechanic revealed her true name to Karrde, and the pair left the planet aboard the ''Uwana Buyer''. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|So you're Syndic Hart. Buzzy was most impressed with you.''"
"''I'm ever so pleased. I won't ask which way he was impressed.|Talon Karrde (as Syndic Pandis Hart) converses with Mara Jade (posing as Celina Marniss)|}} Buzzy was a laconic individual, preferring to let others speak. He was a competent Morodin hunter, and had experience handling blaster weapons. ==Behind the scenes== Buzzy first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[First Contact]]'', which was published in [[1994]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] by [[West End Games]]. ''First Contact'' was subsequently reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|1|First Contact|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
